guardrails: W1.5.214 converts the 11 W1.5.213 needs_followup post-capture decisions into scoped blocker repair plan items only.
No repair item is accepted, implemented, completed, ready, or eligible for FR closure in this slice.
W1.5.214 does not modify runtime behavior, Desktop production behavior, accepted specs, ADR status, schemas, generated schemas, dependencies, packaging, updater work, or baseline docx files.

Evidence and plan fields remain metadata-only and must not contain prompt text, model output, uploaded-file bytes, instruction text, HITL prompt content, response bodies, artifact bodies, secure paths, cache paths, output directory values, full destination paths, credentials, or staged user file content.
FR-015 remains excluded while ADR-0012 is Proposed.
accepted_items and implemented_items remain zero; EXIT-P1-1 and EXIT-P1-10 remain not_ready.

repair_tracks.title: A4 stream final acceptance blockers
repair_tracks.objective: Repair the remaining first-viewport, expanded stream, and event-label acceptance blockers without treating fixture or matrix evidence as final A4 acceptance.

repair_tracks.title: A4 runtime bridge final UX blockers
repair_tracks.objective: Repair remaining reviewer-visible Desktop/runtime user-path blockers for execution modes, Chat instruction routing, projects, references, skills, artifacts, and high-risk HITL.

repair_tracks.title: A8 Git-history conformance blockers
repair_tracks.objective: Close or explicitly defer the remaining runtime_harness.md section 8.2 trigger rows before FR-012 or EXIT-P1-10 can be accepted.

repair_items.objective: Repair the missing formal A4 acceptance for first-viewport default collapsed stream behavior.
required_actions: Prepare reviewer-visible first-viewport stream acceptance evidence without raw stream payload values.
Return the evidence to A4 decision recording before any FR-009 acceptance claim.
acceptance_blockers: The evidence is still matrix metadata and does not record formal first-viewport A4 acceptance.
A phase-level UX acceptance artifact must explicitly accept or reject the default collapsed stream path.

repair_items.objective: Repair the missing final expanded-stream readability and taxonomy acceptance evidence.
required_actions: Prepare workflow-backed or equivalent phase-level expanded stream evidence for reviewer decision.
Keep unknown-event fallback and payload summaries metadata-only.
acceptance_blockers: The end-to-end workflow stream demo remains deferred to later phase-level demo work.
Expanded event taxonomy acceptance is not proven by fixture and matrix metadata alone.

repair_items.objective: Repair missing final user-facing event-label acceptance evidence.
required_actions: Prepare reviewer-visible final event-label evidence derived from accepted stream event categories.
Record A4 decision separately from renderer fallback coverage.
acceptance_blockers: Final user-facing label acceptance is not separately recorded.
The labels still need phase-level stream evidence in a reviewer-approved context.

repair_items.objective: Repair missing final UX acceptance for execution mode behavior.
required_actions: Prepare reviewer-visible mode-change evidence using accepted runtime behavior only.
Keep semi-auto and auto behavior explicitly blocked unless supported by accepted backend evidence.
acceptance_blockers: Semi-auto and auto behavior remain fail-closed rather than accepted runtime-backed execution modes.
A reviewer-visible end-to-end mode-change path must still record final UX acceptance.

repair_items.objective: Repair remaining A4 acceptance blockers for current-node and Workflow Chat instruction UX.
required_actions: Prepare final reviewer-visible Chat instruction UX evidence for both scopes without storing instruction text.
Plan command-history persistence separately from runtime instruction receipt evidence.
acceptance_blockers: Project-backed command history remains outside this slice.
Formal A4 acceptance for current-node and Workflow instruction UX is not recorded.

repair_items.objective: Repair missing final UX acceptance for project creation plus initial reference import.
required_actions: Prepare reviewer-visible new-project evidence covering Git initialization and reference import metadata.
Keep task background and reference file bytes out of evidence.
acceptance_blockers: Full new-project UX acceptance remains unrecorded.
Task background and reference bytes remain intentionally excluded from evidence and cannot be inferred as reviewed content.

repair_items.objective: Repair missing final UX acceptance for reference lifecycle operations.
required_actions: Prepare reviewer-visible reference lifecycle evidence for accepted import/list/enable/disable/view behavior.
Keep delete semantics outside the acceptance claim until they are spec-owned.
acceptance_blockers: Reference lifecycle evidence still needs formal UX acceptance.
Delete semantics remain outside accepted spec scope and must not be inferred from import/list/enable/disable/view evidence.

repair_items.objective: Repair missing final UX acceptance for Skill candidate and MCP metadata display.
required_actions: Prepare final reviewer-visible Skill configuration evidence using secret-safe MCP metadata only.
Keep MCP command and secret values out of evidence.
acceptance_blockers: Skill candidate and MCP metadata display still needs final UX acceptance.
Secret-safe metadata evidence is not a substitute for accepted Skill configuration behavior.

repair_items.objective: Repair missing final UX acceptance for artifact detail and open/download handoff.
required_actions: Prepare real workflow artifact evidence with safe metadata and observable native handoff result.
Keep artifact bodies and raw destination paths out of evidence.
acceptance_blockers: No real generated artifact end-to-end workflow output is accepted yet.
Artifact body inspection remains intentionally excluded; UX acceptance must focus on safe metadata and handoff result.

repair_items.objective: Repair missing final UX acceptance for high-risk HITL pause and resume behavior.
required_actions: Prepare full semi-auto workflow pause/resume evidence with pending decision metadata only.
Keep HITL prompt content and custom decision values out of evidence.
acceptance_blockers: A full semi-auto workflow pause/resume UX recording is still missing.
Pending decision metadata alone cannot prove accepted high-risk HITL resume behavior.

repair_items.objective: Repair remaining runtime_harness.md section 8.2 Git-history conformance blockers before FR-012 acceptance.
required_actions: Map every runtime_harness.md section 8.2 trigger row to implementation evidence or explicit deferral.
Keep EXIT-P1-10 not_ready until A8 conformance evidence covers the phase-level scope.
acceptance_blockers: EXIT-P1-10 remains not_ready because several runtime_harness.md §8.2 trigger rows still need implementation or phase-level conformance evidence.
Mandatory Git project creation evidence cannot close FR-012 until the remaining A8 Git-history rows are covered or explicitly deferred.

excluded_items.reason: Snapshot restore/continue remains blocked while ADR-0012 is Proposed.

next_recommended_slices.title: A4 stream acceptance blocker repair
next_recommended_slices.reason: Execute the W1.5.214 stream repair track for FR-009, FR-010, and FR-016 while keeping unsupported acceptance blocked.
